2606.10738.title: Spatial-Omni: Spatial Audio Understanding Integration in Multimodal LLMs via FOA Encoding
2606.10738.paper_summary: Recent multimodal large language models mainly process audio as monaural signals, thereby discarding the spatial cues contained in spatial audio for sound localization, spatial relation reasoning, and spatial scene understanding. We propose Spatial-Omni, a lightweight method that implements SO-Encoder to inject First-Order Ambisonics (FOA) spatial audio into existing Omni LLMs as an independent modality, without modifying their original audio encoders. SO-Encoder provides spatial tokens with limited additional context cost and improves spatial audio understanding through efficient staged training. To support training and evaluation, we construct SO-Dataset, SO-QA, and SO-Bench from open-source data, real recordings, and simulations, containing 400K FOA spatial audio clips and 2.1M spatial question answering pairs. SO-Bench covers 16 spatial audio understanding subtasks, including basic detection and location estimation, spatial relation understanding, and complex spatial reasoning. Experiments show that Spatial-Omni outperforms existing open-source Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) and Omni LLM models on spatial audio understanding tasks while retaining a reasonable level of general audio understanding. Code and data are available at https://github.com/dieKarotte/Spatial-Omni.
2606.10738.paper_summary_zh: 最近的多模態大型語言模型主要將音頻處理為單聲道信號，因此忽略了空間音頻中包含的空間線索，這些線索對於聲音定位、空間關係推理和空間場景理解至關重要。我們提出了Spatial-Omni，一種輕量級的方法，實現了SO-Encoder，將一階環繞聲（FOA）空間音頻作為獨立模態注入現有的全方位大型語言模型（Omni LLMs），而無需修改其原始音頻編碼器。SO-Encoder提供了有限額外上下文成本的空間標記，並通過高效的分階訓練改善了空間音頻理解。為了支持訓練和評估，我們從開源數據、真實錄音和模擬中構建了SO-Dataset、SO-QA和SO-Bench，包含40萬個FOA空間音頻片段和210萬個空間問答對。SO-Bench涵蓋了16個空間音頻理解子任務，包括基本檢測和位置估計、空間關係理解和複雜的空間推理。實驗表明，Spatial-Omni在空間音頻理解任務上優於現有的開源大型音頻語言模型（LALMs）和全方位LLM模型，同時保持了合理的通用音頻理解水平。代碼和數據可在https://github.com/dieKarotte/Spatial-Omni獲得。
2606.10738.author: Zhiyuan Zhu et.al.
2606.10738.authors: Zhiyuan Zhu, Yixuan Chen, Yiwen Shao, Wenxiang Guo, Changhao Pan, Yu Zhang, Yuxiang Wang, Wei Liu, Houhua Zhang, Chengkuan Zeng, Wenbo Cheng, Yunxi Liu, Rui Yang, Steve Yves, Liefeng Bo, Zhou Zhao
